title: SneefVanilla+
description: A vanilla+ pack centered around exploration and Create machinery.
body:
## SneefVanilla+ (for mc 1.20.1)
This is a collection of mods that are meant to keep the overall feel of vanilla minecraft intact, while making the world more engaging.

Worldgen is completely overhauled by mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), and many structures are added and improved by a large collection of mods made available by [YUNGNICKYOUNG](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG).

Player aesthetics are extended by mods such as [Cosmetic Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor) and [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors). More block variants are available via [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) and [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled).

This pack also includes the [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod, and several of its additions.
